ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, PLAINTIFF ROBERT HAWKINS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-276204 WITH CASE CGC-11-275820. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL IS GRANTED. CASE NO. 275820 AND CASE NO. 276204 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. CASE NO. 275820 IS THE LEAD CASE. CASE NO. 275820'S TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE DATE OF AUGUST 21, 2014 IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2014. CASE NO. 276204'S TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE DATE OF OCTOBER 16, 2014 REMAINS. NO PARTY OPPOSES CONSOLIDATION. ONE ORDER COVERING BOTH CASES WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-275820 WITH CASE CGC-13-276204
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Simon S. Grille of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Robert Hawkins (275820) and Antoinette Kiefer, et al. (276204)

RULING:
PLAINTIFF ROBERT HAWKINS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-276204 WITH CASE CGC-11-275820

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. Case no. 275820 and case no. 276204 are consolidated for all purposes including trial. Case no. 275820 is the lead case. Case no. 275820's Trial Setting Conference date of August 21, 2014 is continued to October 16, 2014. Case no. 276204's Trial Setting Conference date of October 16, 2014 remains. No party opposes consolidation. One order covering both cases was signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
